title: Jade rose
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Jade roses''' were flowers that were cultivated in the upper-class sections of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{Mo}}
